series_metadata.series_title: Employee Disputes, Litigation and Performance Review Appeals
series_metadata.series_description: Personnel disputes and appeals on a variety of work related performance and labor issues filed before the State Personnel Board of Review and the State Employee Review Board. Files include supporting documentation related to the issue, investigatory reports and statements, and the rendered decision.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 7 years and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 7 years and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
